projects.title: Kantarancho Jhelo
projects.description: A digital rendition of a Konkani songbook featuring traditional and modern songs. Explore, learn, and preserve Goan musical heritage.

projects.title: Mogache Goa
projects.description: A personal catalog and guide to the places, designs, foods, and memories that make Goa unique. Discover hidden gems and cultural treasures.

projects.title: Offline Tool Box
projects.description: A collection of fast-loading, offline-capable tools for everyday tasks. No internet required, works seamlessly in your browser.

projects.title: Goa Places Wiki
projects.description: A vintage-style wiki documenting notable places, landmarks, and locations across Goa with historical context and memories.

projects.title: Web Components Library
projects.description: Reusable, accessible web components for modern web development. Built with vanilla JavaScript and CSS.

projects.title: Portuguese Heritage Research
projects.description: Deep dive into the Indo-Portuguese heritage and its influence on Goan culture, architecture, and traditions.

projects.title: Design System
projects.description: A comprehensive design system with typography, colors, components, and guidelines for consistent UI design.

projects.title: Electronics Projects
projects.description: Hands-on electronics experiments and Arduino projects exploring sensors, automation, and embedded systems.
